orchestrator.rationale: Surveys the full board and makes dispatch decisions — needs strongest reasoning

requirements-analyst.rationale: Resolves ambiguity and structures requirements — needs deep reasoning

ticket-creator.rationale: Structured decomposition of requirements into tickets — well-defined task

software-engineer.rationale: Default implementation model; overridden per-ticket by complexity field

code-reviewer.rationale: Code quality, security, and acceptance criteria review

qa-engineer.rationale: Test writing is formulaic once ticket context is provided — cheapest suitable model

release-manager.rationale: Integration verification and merge ordering — moderate reasoning required
